title: Demon Slayer CIT
description: A resource pack that adds Demon Slayer themed CIT and CEM.
body:
# Demon Slayer themed CIT and CEM

Mostly created by Rykel (see credits.txt)

This pack works on Vanilla for the version 25w04a (1.21.5) and onward, but for lower versions it requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) (or [CIT & CEM alternatives](https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev/)) to be installed.

Renaming items changes their texture/model!

Katanas:
- Zenitsu's Katana (Sword)
- Tanjiro's Katana (Sword)

Other Gear:
- Nezuko's Bamboo (Carved Pumpkin)
- Genya's Gun (Crossbow)
- Rengoku's Cloak (Elytra)
- Muzan's Hat (Carved Pumpkin)
- Urokodaki's Mask (Carved Pumpkin)

-----

[Feedback/Suggestions](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdq_7GYQwb5cddheM2Isdq61kI6c2cm1umAzZSl8XskQJd5zQ/viewform?usp=dialog)

[Discord server](https://discord.gg/2gZKFqpHaZ)

`please note that I only add stuff when I feel like it`
